title: HERE I AM
body:
# **HERE I AM**
HERE I AM is a mod that adds features onto [The Broken Script by Wendigodrip](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) But it is not an official part of the mod.



## **Features**

Randomly generating blocks.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler: blocks</summary>

![<o>](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62cd0819815d4afcc6500e608e75ea03c20f1e3b.png)

</details>



Several entities. 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler: Entities</summary>

(Null variants, The_watching, Flight, And more!)
![Nullvoid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26564739576fba8fc61cd73e09b6b10befc2bab2.png)


</details>



Random events. 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler: events</summary>

Current number of events: _13_

</details>






### **DISCLAIMERS**

HERE I AM **CAN** CRASH MINECRAFT, IN VERSIONS BEFORE 1.3.0 THIS CAN LEAD TO PROGRESS LOSS. Turn the feature off with:
Old: /gamerule hereIAmGameCrash false
New: /gamerule hereIAmCrash false

HERE I AM **WILL** GRIEF YOUR WORLD.

HERE I AM WILL NO LONGER BREAK WITH MULTIPLAYER.

**IF YOU ARE USING [THE BROKEN SCRIPT](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) 1.10, PUT MOD RECOURCES ABOVE NOSTAILGA HELPER.**
